message:
fix(notion): truncate error response bodies to 500 chars to prevent memory bloat

Add UTF-8-safe truncate_body() helper that cuts error response bodies at
500 characters before storing in NotionError::NotFound or NotionError::Api.
Prevents a misbehaving upstream from inflating in-memory error messages
or log entries with multi-megabyte bodies.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
